narrative:
Stark County has 245,260 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 2.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.7% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -0.8% D−R vs -5.3% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
